summary: Lantern completed the M7 map situation-mode recovery implementation and returned a PARTIAL text report after interruption; lead transcribed that report into this formal REVIEW handoff after verifying the actual diff and rerunning required local tests. The implementation makes Situation/?? the default player map mode, replaces prototype rectangular district polygons with deterministic low-fidelity soft strategic regions, de-noises routes in the default situation mode, adds localized route semantics/legend/recommendation presentation, and keeps rectangular grid diagnostics out of player mode.

tests_run.result: PASS; task, handoff, goal-mode, model-routing, and thread registry JSON parsed successfully.

decisions: Default player-facing mode is now Situation/?? so the first map read is a strategic situation read, not a seasonal engineering layer.

M2 prototype district presentation now uses deterministic 8-point soft polygons and anchor offsets derived from district number; this changes only client read-model presentation and introduces no new authoritative geography or content-source facts.
Situation mode route rendering filters to selected-district routes plus blocked or capacity-risk routes; full route graph remains available in Routes mode.

Player mode exposes localized legend labels for route/supply, obligation/tributary flow, threat/risk, blocked/capacity, selected district, and settlements; debug grid language remains excluded from default player presentation.
No manual node battle, simulation, save, protocol, AI, content-source, server, telemetry, account, paid-service, final-art, or release scope was touched.
risks: This is a low-fidelity UX recovery patch, not final cartography or production art; content lock still needs later product-owner reconsideration after the full UX recovery chain.
Obligation/tributary-flow semantics are represented at the legend/player-explanation layer using existing read models; no new authoritative obligation route topology is introduced in this task.
The soft-region polygons remain generated prototype shapes and must not be mistaken for historical geography.
requested_action: Review actual branch diff against M7-MAP-SITUATION-MODE-UX-001 acceptance criteria, focusing on architecture boundaries, read-model-only presentation, deterministic soft-region generation, route de-noising semantics, i18n coverage, player/debug separation, and absence of forbidden scope.
